title: If a dog was your teacher, you'd run to greet the people you
content: If a dog was your teacher, you'd run to greet the people you love every single time they come home. You'd never say no to a walk or a moment of fresh air. You'd growl instead of bite. You'd lie in the warm grass and call it enough. You'd sit close to someone having a bad day without saying a single word. And when something made you happy, your whole body would know it. That's the secret. Dogs have been living it the whole time.
